title: OpenApe Testrun — self-check E2E
summary: The service verifies itself: the landing page renders on desktop and mobile, and unknown report links fail gracefully. One test is intentionally marked failed to show how failures look.

tests.title: Landing page renders with login
tests.description: The start page shows the value proposition and the email login — no extra click to a separate login route.

steps.title: Desktop view
steps.caption: Headline, email field and the **Login with OpenApe** button are above the fold.

steps.title: Mobile view
steps.caption: The same page on a 390px viewport — fully usable on a phone.

tests.title: Unknown report links fail gracefully
tests.description: Opening `/r/does-not-exist` shows a friendly not-found page instead of an error dump.

steps.title: Not-found page
steps.caption: The viewer sees a clear *Report not found* message.

tests.title: Example of a failing test
tests.description: Intentionally marked as failed so the report demonstrates failure rendering.
tests.error:
Expected the moon on a stick, got a stick.

```
AssertionError: moon !== stick
```

steps.title: Text-only failing step
steps.caption: Steps without screenshots render as text — useful for API assertions.
